title: Mosaic Blocks v1 (sketch)
description: Per-block sub-schemas constraining props. The general building-block catalog (docs/proposal.md §4). Every block is a general shape - no domain templates. Sketch only; fills in as the registry stabilizes.

Grid.description: 12-column track model with named areas. The bespoke-layout workhorse.

_content.const: Text, Heading, Markdown, Image, Icon, Link, Badge, Tag, Avatar, Code, Callout, Card

Markdown.description: Sanitized prose block. No HTML passthrough.

alt.description: REQUIRED. Validation fails without it. See docs/proposal.md §4.1.

Callout.description: Inline info/warn/error notice; tone from the theme.

Card.description: A themed surface (padding, radius, border from the theme).

_controls.const: Button, Input, Select, MultiSelect, Autocomplete, Checkbox, Radio, Toggle, Slider, DatePicker, ColorPicker, FilePicker, Rating, TagInput, Field, Disclosure, Accordion

Input.description: type = text | number | email | password | textarea | search.

Select.description: Single choice over a fixed option set.

MultiSelect.description: Multiple choices over a fixed option set; bind:state holds an array.

Autocomplete.description: Type-ahead over baked-in options; filtering is local, no data-pull.

Slider.description: Numeric range; supports a range variant. bind:state for the value.

Field.description: Label + control + help + error wrapper. The form workhorse.

Tabs.description: items = tab labels; active = default tab (label or index); one child panel per item; variant = pill | underline. bind:state to drive from state.

Progress.description: Linear or circular completion indicator (a value, not a loading spinner).

_dataviz.const: DataTable, List, Tree, Board, Timeline, Calendar, Stat, Chart, VegaChart, Diagram, Canvas, Embed

DataTable.description: Sortable/filterable/paginated columns + rows. Data in prop-arrays (rows/columns), not cell nodes.

List.description: Itemized/virtualizable list with a row template. Covers key-value and feeds.

Tree.description: General hierarchy - file trees, org charts, module maps.

Board.description: Columns of cards, optional sortable. Kanban/triage/pipeline are instances.

description.description: Optional detail line under the title.

tone.description: Semantic tone token (ok | warn | bad | neutral | ...); colors the item marker.

Stat.description: Big number + label + delta + optional trend.

Chart.description: One chart. type selects the shape; data in prop-arrays. alt required.

VegaChart.description: Full Vega-Lite v5 spec as inline JSON literal. A grammar, not a fixed set. Spec is data, not code. alt required.

Diagram.description: Declarative node/edge/group diagram - flows, architecture maps, funnels, concept shifts. The renderer owns layout; selection binds to state via bind:state. alt required.

alt.description: REQUIRED. Validation fails without it. See docs/proposal.md §4.1.

kind.description: Semantic shape token; 'code' renders monospaced. Forward-compatible: an unknown kind renders as the default box.

tone.description: Semantic tone token (ok | warn | bad | neutral | ...).

detail.description: One-liner surfaced by renderers on selection/hover.

from.description: A nodes[].id or groups[].id; a group edge attaches to the group hull.

Canvas.description: Inline sanitized SVG (svg prop) - the bespoke escape hatch for what Diagram/Chart/VegaChart cannot express. Data is in the artifact. alt required.

Embed.description: Escape hatch. Default permission: deny. See docs/proposal.md §8.
